title: Pacouria amoena
taxonomy: Pacouria amoena is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the custard apple family. It belongs to the genus Pacouria, which consists of several species of plants native to Central and South America. The Annonaceae family includes over 2,000 species of plants, many of which are tropical and produce edible fruits.
